name: talos
desc: High-performance Layer 4 firewall using eBPF/XDP. Kernel-fast packet filtering with dynamic blacklisting, rate limiting, and real-time TUI dashboard. Written in Go and C.

name: styx
desc: Distributed membership system that refuses to lie. Returns probability distributions instead of booleans.

name: ares
desc: Inference-time reasoning framework. Trade compute for correctness.

name: aegis
desc: PostgreSQL wire-protocol proxy. Query logging, safe rewrites, read/write routing, rate limiting, and policy enforcement.

name: void
desc: A fully serverless, browser-native IDE where the entire operating system runs client‑side via WebAssembly, Web Workers, and IndexedDB.

name: CODEXINTERN-Python-Development
desc: Python internship tasks - Data Analysis, ML, Matrix Operations
